project.name: Sample Portal Frame
project.description: Simple grid-based portal frame sample. Geometry is stored directly in member start/end and plate placement; grids and placementIntent are descriptive only.

authoring.notes: Template provenance only; members are stored explicitly.

cz_side_a_start.name: Side beam A start to column 1/A

cz_side_a_end.name: Side beam A end to column 2/A

cz_side_b_start.name: Side beam B start to column 1/B

cz_side_b_end.name: Side beam B end to column 2/B

cz_cross_a.name: Cross beam start to side beam A

cz_cross_b.name: Cross beam end to side beam B
